sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Jiuzi Holdings regains Nasdaq minimum bid price compliance By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jiuzi Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:JZXN) has regained compliance with the Nasdaq Stock Market's minimum bid price requirement. The company confirmed receipt of a notification letter from Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department after its ordinary shares traded at or above $1.00 for 19 consecutive business days. This resolves a prior non-compliance notification from November 2025 where its shares had fallen below the minimum bid price.

feed.title: Insider Selling: ANI Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ANIP) VP Sells 500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals VP, Meredith Cook, sold 500 shares of company stock on January 13th for $42,165, reducing her ownership by 0.67%. The sale occurred at an average price of $84.33 per share. The company's stock currently trades around $85.03, and it recently beat Q3 earnings estimates with revenue up 53.6% year-over-year.

feed.title: Heritage Commerce (HTBK) Price Target Increased by 10.14% to 13.67
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Heritage Commerce (HTBK) has been increased by 10.14% to $13.67 per share, an average compiled from various analysts' estimates. This new target is 9.70% higher than the latest closing price of $12.46. Institutional ownership and fund sentiment for HTBK show a generally bullish outlook, with a significant number of funds holding increased positions despite some reallocations.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty LTD sells $81,941 in Sound Point Meridian (SPMC) By Investing.com

(NASDAQ: SPMC), sold 5,697 shares of common stock totaling $81,941 across three transactions between January 12 and January 14, 2026. Following these sales, Assured Guaranty LTD indirectly retains 5,274,557 shares. feed.title: Duke Energy Plans to Build a Massive Natural Gas Power Plant in Davidson County. But Where, Exactly?
feed.summary: Duke Energy plans to build a large 1,360-megawatt natural gas power plant in western Davidson County, North Carolina, which could add significant greenhouse gases to the atmosphere. While Duke remains cagey about the exact site, environmentalists have identified a 1,600-acre company-owned parcel near the Yadkin River as a potential location. This fossil fuel expansion is part of Duke's strategy to meet growing energy demands, citing data centers and population increases, but faces opposition due to environmental concerns and potential cost increases for ratepayers.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) Stock Price
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has lowered its price target for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) to $506 from $517, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 13.1% upside. Despite a mixed analyst sentiment of "Moderate Buy" and recent strong quarterly earnings, insider selling activity suggests caution, with 32,002 shares worth approximately $14.3 million sold in the last quarter. The company, a leading infrastructure solutions provider, beat revenue and EPS estimates and provided positive FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Susquehanna Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) Stock
feed.summary: Susquehanna has increased its price target for Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) to $304 from $288, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 4.52% upside. Analyst consensus for NSC is a "Hold" with an average target of $303.52, while the stock trades near its one-year high. Recent insider purchases and significant institutional ownership underscore investor interest in the railroad operator.

feed.title: Assurant Inc. stock: Quiet outperformance, firm conviction – and a market that keeps underestimati
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. stock has quietly outperformed the broader market, driven by strong fundamentals and supportive analyst commentary, even as it trades at a valuation that suggests it's underestimated. The company's focus on specialty insurance and service contracts, particularly in mobile device protection and extended warranties, has led to solid financial performance and consistent shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases. Wall Street analysts largely maintain "Buy" ratings, forecasting further upside, and the company's strategic positioning in recurring revenue streams and capital management discipline continue to support a bullish outlook.

feed.title: Vestis Faces Legal Scrutiny and Stock Struggles Amid Revenue Forecasts
feed.summary: Vestis Corporation's stock has dropped by 12.87% due to leadership reshuffle concerns and legal scrutiny over allegedly misleading financial guidance. The company faces a challenging fiscal year with modest to negative revenue forecasts, cautious EBITDA predictions, and a high debt-to-equity ratio. Despite some efficient cost management indicated by a 27.4% gross margin, investors remain wary, demanding strategic pivots and fortified corporate ethics to regain trust.

feed.title: RF Industries Ltd (NASDAQ:RFIL) Stock Surges on Strong Q4 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: RF Industries Ltd (NASDAQ:RFIL) reported robust financial results for its fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, significantly surpassing analyst expectations. The company achieved substantial increases in revenue and adjusted EPS, with strong operational improvements including expanded gross profit margins and a swing to operating income. This performance, coupled with a healthy backlog and strategic transformation, has led to a positive market reaction and boosted investor confidence.

feed.title: BMO Capital Markets Increases Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) Price Target to $36.00
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets has increased its price target for Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) to $36.00 from $31.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, which suggests a nearly 9.8% upside. The broader analyst consensus for Halliburton is a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $33.57. Recent insider activity shows net selling, and the company's upcoming quarterly earnings report is anticipated as a key near-term catalyst.

feed.title: Valero to Cut More Than 200 Jobs as California Refinery Closes
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp. plans to lay off 237 employees at its Benicia refinery in California as it permanently ceases operations at the plant. The job cuts will occur between March 15 and July 1, affecting non-unionized workers and representing the majority of the refinery's 348-person staff. This closure impacts one of California's few remaining fuel production facilities.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) Price Target Lowered to $168.00 at Guggenheim

Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for LYV, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a target price of $172.95. The company recently reported Q3 earnings that missed analyst estimates, and its stock is currently trading at $145.71.

feed.title: Macquarie Sticks to Their Buy Rating for Amcor PLC Shs Chess Depository Interests (AMC)

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company Earns 10 Actor Award® Nominations
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company has received 10 Actor Award® nominations across its various content brands and studios. The awards ceremony will take place on March 1, and Disney Legend Harrison Ford will be honored with the SAG-AFTRA Life Achievement Award. Notable nominations include "The Beast in Me" for acting performances, "Only Murders in the Building" and "The Bear" for ensemble comedy, and "Andor" for stunt performance.

feed.title: Jabil executive chairman Mondello sells $5.5m in stock
feed.summary: Jabil's Executive Chairman Mark T. Mondello sold $5.5 million worth of company stock through multiple transactions between January 13 and January 15, 2026. These sales involved 15,777 shares, 4,223 shares, and 2,800 shares at varying prices. Following these transactions, Mondello directly owns 1,128,659 shares of Jabil.

feed.title: Verizon customers in metro Atlanta left frustrated after Wednesday's widespread service outage
feed.summary: Verizon Wireless customers in metro Atlanta experienced a widespread service outage on Wednesday, leaving many frustrated and unable to communicate. The outage, which was fixed on Thursday, affected hundreds of thousands and prompted users and experts to share tips for staying connected during such events. Verizon is offering a $20 credit to affected customers, and the cause of the outage remains unknown.

feed.title: Is Garmin Actually Worth Your Money? The Brutally Honest Breakdown Everyone’s Searching For
feed.summary: This article evaluates whether Garmin devices and the company's stock are worth the investment, particularly for serious athletes and outdoor enthusiasts. It highlights Garmin's superior battery life, precise fitness tracking, and GPS accuracy compared to competitors like Apple Watch and Samsung. While acknowledging Garmin's higher price point and niche market appeal, the article suggests it offers long-term value for performance-focused users and could be a solid, if not flashy, addition to an investment portfolio.

feed.title: Hormel taps Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has appointed Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail, effective February 23. Borrelli brings over 25 years of experience from companies like Danone, Kraft, and Maple Leaf, and will lead Hormel's Retail business unit, a key growth engine. John Ghingo, president of Hormel Foods, highlighted Borrelli's proven track record in driving consumer-driven growth and strategic leadership.

feed.title: Verisign exec. chairman Bidzos sells $2.2m in shares
feed.summary: Verisign's Executive Chairman, President, and CEO, D. James Bidzos, sold 9,040 shares of common stock for a total of $2.2 million between January 13 and January 15, 2026. Following these transactions, Bidzos directly owns over 412,000 shares of Verisign. The company is valued at $23.07 billion and is scheduled to report earnings on February 5.

feed.title: Trimble (NASDAQ:TRMB) CEO Robert Painter Sells 7,500 Shares of Stock

feed.title: Early look at Caterpillar's 2025 results: how to listen to the Jan. 29 call
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on January 29, 2026, at 5:30 a.m. CST, followed by a teleconference and webcast for analysts and investors at 7:30 a.m. CST. The company has recently highlighted strategic AI initiatives and leadership changes, which investors will likely contextualize with the upcoming financial results. Details for accessing the release, webcast, and teleconference are provided.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP Notifies Investors
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: VTGN) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between April 1, 2024, and December 16, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Vistagen made false statements regarding its Phase 3 PALISADE-3 trial for fasedienol, which ultimately failed to meet its primary endpoint, causing an 80% stock price drop. Investors have until March 16, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Knowles, Chevron controller, sells $537,600 in CVX stock
feed.summary: Alana K. Knowles, a Controller at Chevron (NYSE: CVX), sold 3,200 shares of company stock for $537,600 on January 14, 2026, under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. On the same day, Knowles also exercised options to acquire 3,200 shares, costing $424,608. Following these transactions, Knowles holds 1,207 direct shares and 12,944 indirect shares through a 401(k) plan, and recently acquired 20 additional shares via an employee savings plan.

feed.title: TTEC Wins Gold for AI-Powered Learning Innovation at Brandon Hall Group Technology Excellence Awards™
feed.summary: TTEC Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEC) received a Gold Award at the Brandon Hall Group Technology Excellence Awards for its AI-powered Learning Wizards Suite in the Generative AI Learning Solution category. This proprietary system accelerates learning design, improves quality through a human-in-the-loop approach, and delivers measurable business impact. The award recognizes TTEC's commitment to transforming learning experiences at scale by combining advanced technology with learning science.

feed.title: TTEC Holdings, Inc. Wins Gold Award for Learning Wizards Suite at Brandon Hall Group Technology Excellence Awards
feed.summary: TTEC Holdings, Inc. received a Gold Award at the 2025 Brandon Hall Group Technology Excellence Awards for its Learning Wizards Suite in the Best Advance in Generative AI Learning Solution category. The Learning Wizards Suite is an AI-enabled learning design ecosystem that helps streamline curriculum development and improve design quality. This recognition highlights TTEC's commitment to innovation in AI-enhanced customer experience technology and transformative learning experiences.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividend and Timing of Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Webcast
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.00 per common share for the fourth quarter of 2025, payable February 13, 2026. The company also intends to recommend to its Board of Directors an increase to its common dividend to $1.25 per common share for the first quarter of 2026. Additionally, Targa will report its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results and host an earnings webcast on February 19, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time.

Arista Networks previously exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $0.75 against an estimated $0.72 and revenue of $2.31 billion, a 27.5% year-over-year increase.

feed.title: SiTime Corporation to Announce Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on February 4, 2026
feed.summary: SiTime Corporation will announce its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 4, 2026, after market close. The company's CEO, Rajesh Vashist, and CFO, Beth Howe, will host a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss the results. Analysts and investors can join via live webcast or by registering for a dial-in number.

feed.title: Latham & Watkins Advises Mission in US$430 Million Acquisition of Calavo Growers
feed.summary: Latham & Watkins LLP advised Mission Produce, Inc. in its US$430 million acquisition of Calavo Growers, Inc. The deal, structured as a cash-and-stock transaction, will result in Calavo stockholders receiving US$27 per share, composed of cash and Mission shares. This acquisition is subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals and is expected to close by the end of August 2026.

feed.title: Will Moody's (MCO) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: This article suggests that Moody's (MCO) is well-positioned to beat its earnings estimates in the upcoming quarterly report, continuing a trend from its previous two quarters. The forecast is based on MCO's positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +1.16% and a strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicating a high probability of exceeding analyst expectations. Investors are encouraged to consider these metrics as indicators for potential future performance.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin demonstrates first 90-degree vertical JAGM missile launch, highlighting counter-UAS capability
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin successfully conducted the first 90-degree vertical launch of its Joint Air-to-Ground Missile (JAGM) from a Quad Launcher, demonstrating enhanced defensive capabilities. The launch validated JAGM's versatility across multiple platforms, including surface vessels, and its ability to detect and neutralize unmanned aerial system threats. This milestone reinforces the missile's relevance for counter-UAS and multidomain operations, contributing to a unified missile architecture for future combat operations.

feed.title: RBC Capital initiates Astera Labs stock with Outperform rating, $225 target
feed.summary: RBC Capital has initiated coverage on Astera Labs (NASDAQ:ALAB) with an Outperform rating and a $225 price target. The firm cited strong near-term fundamentals from core retimer growth and Scorpio-P switch ramps, along with the expected 2026 ramp of Astera’s Scorpio-X scale-up switch, as key drivers for its positive outlook. Despite recent stock underperformance due to concerns about networking standards and Google's TPU advancements, RBC Capital justifies its premium valuation based on Astera Labs' projected 40% growth rate, a $10-15 billion serviceable available market, and gross margins over 70%.

feed.title: Valens Semiconductor - Equity Warrant (VLN.WS) Price Target Decreased by 16.69% to 0.13
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Valens Semiconductor - Equity Warrant (VLN.WS) has been reduced by 16.69% to $0.13 per share from a previous estimate of $0.15. This new target represents an increase of 42.58% from the latest reported closing price of $0.09 per share. Institutional ownership data shows 10 funds or institutions holding positions in VLN.WS, with key holders including LMR Partners LLP and D. E. Shaw.

feed.title: TIM S.A. Schedules 2026 Annual Shareholders’ Meeting for March 26
feed.summary: TIM S.A. announced that its Annual Shareholders’ Meeting is scheduled for March 26, 2026, with official documents to be released soon. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TIMB as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance, robust revenue growth, and an attractive valuation, despite minor concerns about cost pressures. The telecom operator's stock currently has an average analyst rating of Sell with a $24.00 price target.

feed.title: Hormel taps Borrelli as executive VP of Retail
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corp. has appointed Domenic Borrelli as executive vice president of Retail, effective February 23, 2026. Borrelli will oversee the Retail business unit, which includes many of the company's well-known consumer brands and is a major growth driver. He brings over 25 years of experience in the food and beverage industry, with a strong background in brand building, commercial strategy, and enterprise leadership.

feed.title: Assessing Clorox (CLX) Valuation After Launch Of PURE Allergen Neutralizer In Indoor Wellness Market
feed.summary: Clorox (CLX) has launched Clorox PURE Allergen Neutralizer, entering the indoor wellness market with plant-based air and fabric sprays. Despite recent share price gains, the stock has underperformed long-term, but is currently assessed as 9.1% undervalued with a fair value of US$122.41. This valuation is based on expected operational efficiencies and margin expansion from an ERP system implementation, though the company faces risks from sluggish category growth and price competition.

feed.title: LendingTree's new CEO, Scott Peyree
feed.summary: This article features an interview with Scott Peyree, the new CEO of LendingTree, published in The Charlotte Ledger Podcast. Peyree discusses his unexpected transition into leadership after the sudden death of former CEO Doug Lebda, the company's future in Charlotte, and the potential impact of AI on financial shopping. The conversation also covers LendingTree's evolution, growth areas, and the enduring relevance of marketplaces in an AI-driven financial world.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Issues Positive Forecast for T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) Stock Price
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) to $116, indicating an 8.09% potential upside. Despite this positive change, the overall analyst sentiment is mixed-to-negative, with most firms rating the stock a "Hold" or "Sell." T. Rowe Price recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $2.81 EPS against an expected $2.55 and revenues of $1.89 billion.

feed.summary: Wolfe Research has lowered its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $122 from $126 but maintained an "Outperform" rating, indicating a potential 23.34% upside. feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) Price Target Raised to $1,300.00
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has raised its price target for BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) to $1,300, maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 12.31% upside. This follows BlackRock's strong Q4 performance, which saw estimates beaten with $13.16 EPS and $7.01 billion revenue, a record $14 trillion in Assets Under Management (AUM), and a 10% dividend hike along with a new share buyback authorization. Despite some analyst divergence on profitability, the overall sentiment remains positive, with a consensus target price of $1,303.18.

feed.title: Too much road salt can taint your tap water, New Jersey group warns
feed.summary: New Jersey American Water and The Watershed Institute are urging residents, businesses, and municipalities to limit winter road salt use to safeguard drinking water and aquatic ecosystems. Excessive salt can lead to a temporary salty taste in tap water and harm aquatic life, with effects potentially worsening in drought conditions. They are promoting Winter Salt Week (Jan. 26–30, 2026) to educate the public on practical, sustainable salting practices like shoveling first, using precise amounts of salt, and exploring alternatives like liquid brine.
